titleStmt.title: SII 26.729: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 729. (A.R. No. 678 of 1909.) TIRUNEḌUṄGAḶAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the Chaṇḍikēśvara shrine in the temple.

It records a sale of land in Tiruneḍuṅgaḷam alias Tiyāgavallich-chatuppēdimaṅgalam, a Brammadēśam, in Vaḍakavira-nāḍu in Pāṇḍikulāśaṉi-vaḷanāḍu, by some bhaṭṭas (names given) who were members of the sabhai of the place and by another bhaṭṭa of Perumarudūr, to a certain Aḍiyārkaḷ-iḍarkaḷaivān alias Anavāya-Muttaraiyar, the son of Viḷambakkuḍaiyān Tillai Tirunaṭṭapperumāḷ alias Viśayālaiya Muttaraiyar of Viḷambakkuḍi in the same nāḍu, for a sum of 5,000 Aṉṟāḍu Naṟkāśu.
It is stated that the individual belonging to Perumarudūr got 1,600 kāśu and the members of the sabhai of Tiruneḍuṅgaḷam got 3,400 kāśu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī rājarājatevarkku yāṇṭu 4 vatu pāṇṭikulācaṉi vaḷanā
ṭṭu vaṭakaviranāṭṭu brammatecam tiruneṭuṅkaḷamāna tiyākavalliccatuppeti maṅkalattu sabhaikkuc camai
nta kuravaceripperiyanampipaṭṭaṉum kuravaccerikariyamāṇikkapaṭṭan makaṉ yajñodharapaṭṭaṉum kura
vacerittāmotarapaṭṭaṉum kuravaceriparamecurapaṭṭaṉum muppirāl kuṉṟavapaṭṭaṉum Ivan tampi kecavapa
ṭṭaṉum kuravaceri Iḷaiyakarumāṇikkapaṭṭaṉum �kāśipan maṇṭaiyāḻvān vetanāyakapaṭṭaṉum
Ivvaṉaivom Innāṭṭu viḷampakuṭi viḷampakuṭaiyān tillaitirunaṭṭapperumāḷāṉa vicaiyālai
ya muttaraiyar piḷḷaikaḷil Āḷuṭaiyapiḷḷaiyār Aṭiyārkaḷ Iṭarkaḷaivānāna Anavāya muttaraiyaṟku nā
ṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai � ṇukku meṟkkum tenpāṟkellai tiruveṇkāṭ
ṭu vākkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai tiyāka vatikkuk kiḻakku mutal kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭām cati
rattukku kiḻakkum
tevatānamāka nāṅkaḷ peṟṟa nilattukkum E
naṭuvupaṭṭa viḷainilamum kāṭuṅ karampaiyum koṟṟattakkuṭi nattamum Uḷpaṭa nilam 10 4m
viravu nilam kiṭan=ta Ivvellaiyil Akappaṭṭa nilattuṭ perumarutūr kā
ḻavāna vetanāyakapaṭṭan nilam ç nāla virivu nilam 10 6m Āka nilam 3 � Iraṇṭumā � ¿ 1muntiri kiśakku mukkāl
ttuk koḷvatāna Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Anṟāṭu naṟkācu 5 1000 Itil peru
ṭai Āḻvān vetanāyakapaṭṭan koṇṭa kācu 1000 6 100m nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa kācu 3 1000 4 100m
� muṅkāṭṭeṟikkaic celavaṟakkoṇṭu Innilam muṉṟemukkāle Iraṇṭu mā mukka
tirikai kiḻ mukkāle munṟu mā mukkāṇiyum Inta Āḷuṭaiyapiḷḷaiyāṉa Aṭiyān Iṭar
kaḷaivānāna Aṉavāya muttaraiyaṟkum
ya pirāṭṭikkum vitiviṭaṅka perumāḷukkum peruṭaiya kurukkaḷ makanār pāradvāji Āḷavantān niṭavalla
māra caṭaiyāṟkum tāna vikkirayaṅkaḷukku ka viṟṟukkuṭuttom tiruneṭuṅkaḷamāṉa tiyākavalliccatuppe
timaṅkalattu sabhaikkuc camainta mun paṭṭa Ivvaṉaivom mum perumarutūrk kācivan maṇṭaiyāḻ
vān vetanāyakapaṭṭaṉum Ivvaṉaivom Itu panmāheśvararakṣai .§ svastiśrī tri(ri)puvanaccakkaravattikaḷ
Digital edition of SII 26.729 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
